_title: BS 5536:1978 — Recommendations for preparation of technical drawings and diagrams for acceptance purposes
scope: UK adaptation of ISO 128 line conventions for technical drawings + electrical schematics + drawing organization for acceptance purposes.

key_references_in_this_folder.line-conventions.json: UK line width + type mapping for visible/hidden/centreline/dimension/hatching/border + UK-specific electrical schematic notes
key_references_in_this_folder.cross-references.json: Links to ISO 128 (international base) + BS 1192 (UK CDE/layer naming)
